Bababoefoe

Round, fluffy, and never adventuring alone.

Round, ultra-fluffy little critters that hold hands in a chain, hide a tiny keepsake in a secret pocket, and carry their own story on a QR tag. Meet the family:

Pirate Bababoefoe

teal

Carries a crumb treasure-map.

Chef Bababoefoe

orange

Carries a tiny warm baguette.

Police Bababoefoe

blue

Carries a tiny silver whistle.

Santa Bababoefoe

brown
seasonal

Carries a small golden bell.

Witch Bababoefoe

purple
seasonal

Carries a single dried aster.

See the full collection →

Bababoefoe · every edition carries its own story.
